'''dashaha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:encapsulin|encapsulin]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-sh-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:encapsulin|encapsulin]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| dashaha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dæshæhæth|dæshæhæth]] || [[word:dæshæhæj|dæshæhæj]] || [[word:dæshæhæsh|dæshæhæsh]] || [[word:dæshæhæ|dæshæhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dashashahath|dashashahath]] || [[word:dashashahaj|dashashahaj]] || [[word:dashashahash|dashashahash]] || [[word:dashashaha|dashashaha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dashahath|dashahath]] || [[word:dashahaj|dashahaj]] || [[word:dashahash|dashahash]] || [[word:dashaha|dashaha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dashafhath|dashafhath]] || [[word:dashafhaj|dashafhaj]] || [[word:dashafhash|dashafhash]] || [[word:dashafhaf|dashafhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dashahatha|dashahatha]] || [[word:dashahaja|dashahaja]] || [[word:dashahasha|dashahasha]] || [[word:dashahaka|dashahaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dashahath|dashahath]] || [[word:dashahaj|dashahaj]] || [[word:dashahash|dashahash]] || [[word:dashaha|dashaha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dashahathal|dashahathal]] || [[word:dashahajal|dashahajal]] || [[word:dashahashal|dashahashal]] || [[word:dashahakal|dashahakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dashahathatha|dashahathatha]] || [[word:dashahajaja|dashahajaja]] || [[word:dashahashasha|dashahashasha]] || [[word:dashahaka|dashahaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dashahathan|dashahathan]] || [[word:dashahajan|dashahajan]] || [[word:dashahashan|dashahashan]] || [[word:dashahakan|dashahakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dashahathaoro|dashahathaoro]] || [[word:dashahajaoro|dashahajaoro]] || [[word:dashahashaoro|dashahashaoro]] || [[word:dashahakaoro|dashahakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7296ca6}}
